Package ecarx.carext.connect.net.wifi

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    ActionListener
    Interface for callback invocation on an application action
    ApClient
    Represents a client connected to the ap.
    ApClientListener
    Connected ap clients observer.
    ApConfigurationListener
    Ap configuration observer.
    ApStateListener
    Wi-Fi ap state observer.
    IExternalWifiAp
    This class provides the API for managing Wi-Fi ap connectivity provided by external hardware.
    IExternalWifiSta
    This class provides the API for managing Wi-Fi sta connectivity provided by external hardware.
    StaConnectionListener
    Wi-Fi sta connection info observer.
    StaScanResultListener
    Wi-Fi sta scan result observer.
    StaStateListener
    Wi-Fi sta state observer.
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    ExternalWifiApManager
    External Wi-Fi ap function entry.
    ExternalWifiStaManager
    External Wi-Fi sta function entry.
  • Annotation Types Summary 
    Annotation Type Description
    ActionListener.ActionListenerFailureReason
    Failure reason.
    StaConnectionListener.ErrorCode
    Error code.
    StaConnectionListener.State
    Connection state.
